prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约15672名，2024年大幅前移至10719名，2025年基本持平于10845名。近两年位次稳定在10700-10900区间，较2023年有明显前移，反映该校在新 疆理科考生中的认可度有所提升。2025年基准位次约10845名；该校在新疆理科招生计划：2023年5人、2024年6人、2025年6人，2026年大幅扩招至11 人，较2025年增加5人，增幅约83%。大幅扩招意味着录取名额显著增加，竞争压力有所缓解，位次有后移倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软 科中国大学排名2026年约第120名，近年排名稳定在116-122名区间，属于中游偏上211院校，农林特色鲜明；该校在近年声誉监测中未出现明显负面舆情事件；抖音学校热度排名第95位，综合热度一般，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低，未出现显著的报考关注升温信号；第五轮学科评估中食品科学与工程获评A-，为该校唯 一A-及以上学科，与该校农林特色高度契合，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在新疆理科招生的计算机类（含人工智能）属高热推荐，金融学类属分 化观望，工商管理类属明显劝退。新疆2026年高考总考生约23.8万人，较2025年约7.65万人大幅增长约211%，按历史比例估算理科考生约16.3万人，竞争显著加剧。；该校位于黑龙江哈尔滨，距新疆较远，属于跨省远距离报考。新疆考生对东北地区高校的地域偏好一般，远距离可能对报考热度有一定抑制作 用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10845名、2026年大幅扩招83%（位次后移约5422名）及新疆考生暴增约211%（竞争加剧）等多重因素，扩招效应与考生增加效应相互对 冲后，竞争加剧仍占主导。，结合考生暴增因素小幅修正，预测2026年最低位次约16068名，区间15568-16568名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年理科预测位次约16068名，区间15568-16568名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业可适当冲刺（计算机类、金融学类位次要求较高），三档专业作 为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（如15568名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类等热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 15672, significantly moving forward to 10719 in 2024, and remaining basically stable at 10845 in 2025. Rankings in the past two years have stabilized in the 10700-10900 range, showing a clear forward shift compared to 2023, reflecting an increase in recognition among science candidates in Xinjiang. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10845; the enrollment plan for science in Xinjiang: 5 in 2023, 6 in 2024, 6 in 2025, and a significant expansion to 11 in 2026, an increase of 5 compared to 2025, an increase of about 83%. The significant expansion means a notable increase in admission slots, easing competition pressure, with a tendency for rankings to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 120th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 116-122 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 institutions, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics; no significant negative public opinion incidents have been detected in recent reputation monitoring; Douyin school popularity ranking is 95th, with average overall popularity, medium to low exposure on short video platforms, with no significant signals of increased application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, highly aligned with its agricultural and forestry characteristics, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: For science admissions in Xinjiang, Computer categories (including Artificial Intelligence) are highly recommended, Finance categories are divided and under observation, and Business Administration categories are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Xinjiang is approximately 238,000, a significant increase of about 211% compared to approximately 76,500 in 2025. Based on historical proportions, science candidates are estimated at about 163,000, with significantly intensified competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, far from Xinjiang, making it a long-distance cross-province application. Xinjiang candidates generally have average regional preference for universities in Northeast China, and the long distance may have a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 10845, the significant 83% expansion in 2026 (ranking backward shift of approximately 5422), and the surge in Xinjiang candidates by about 211% (intensified competition), the expansion effect and candidate increase effect offset each other, with intensified competition still dominating. Combined with a minor correction due to the candidate surge, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 16068, with a range of 15568-16568.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer categories (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Finance categories (Finance, Insurance, International Economics and Trade)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Business Administration categories (Business Administration, Accounting, Marketing, Human Resource Management)
- Water Conservancy categories (Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering, Hydrology and Water Resources Engineering, Agricultural Water Conservancy Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Food Science and Engineering categories (Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, Grain Engineering, Dairy Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health)
- Animal Production categories (Animal Science, Grassland Science, Aquaculture)
- Smart Agriculture
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for science in 2026 is approximately 16068, with a range of 15568-16568. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors can be considered for a moderate challenge (Computer and Finance categories have higher ranking requirements), and Tier 3 majors serve as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 15568) can focus on aiming for popular majors like Computer categories.
